---
title: "check_convergence"
output: html_document
---

```{r, warning=FALSE}}
if(!require('pacman')) {
  install.packages('pacman')
}
pacman::p_load(dplyr)
setwd("/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Margaret/sex_mod_braincharts")
```

```{r}
# Define the top-level directory (change this as needed)
base_dir <- "/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_processing/Margaret/sex_mod_braincharts"

# Find all files named 'convergence_summary.csv' recursively
csv_files <- list.files(base_dir, pattern = "^convergence_summary\\.csv$", 
                        recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)

# Check how many files were found
cat("Found", length(csv_files), "files\n")

# Read and merge them all
merged_df <- csv_files %>%
  lapply(read.csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  bind_rows(.id = "source_file")

# Optional: Add directory info for tracking
merged_df <- merged_df %>%
  mutate(
    source_dir = dirname(csv_files[as.integer(source_file)])
  )
```

check by pheno
```{r}
convergence_sum <- merged_df %>% 
  mutate(pheno = sub("_.*", "", file)) %>% 
  group_by(cv_sample, pheno) %>% 
  summarise(n_failed = sum(converged==FALSE)) %>%
  mutate(rerun = ifelse(n_failed==0, FALSE, TRUE))

table(convergence_sum$rerun)
```

For all phenos that have non-converged models, need to:
1) delete non-converged models
2) rename "_BestMod.rds" to "_mod.rds"
3) remove pngs of fan plots, worm plots
4) rerun fit_cv_mods.R - write new config file with just these phenos?
